anchor_quality_legend.subsystem-only: only subsystem keywords; matcher may rely on llm-judge escalation

claims._anchor_notes: function_name 'get_minimum_stake_delegation' is the Agave-side name; FD-side has no equivalent symbol on v1.0
tracker title uses C++ scope syntax 'fd_sysvar_pos_t::decode'; FD-side stores decoders as struct callback fields, not as a top-level function symbol

tracker references src/discof/restore/fd_snapmk_para.c which is absent from v1.0 source tree (no 'snapmk' references anywhere). Likely an auditor-internal branch artifact; matcher will not hit on v1.0 runs
tracker links to fd_h2_rbuf.h (the buffer it doesn't check) but the function fd_h2_tx_rst_stream is defined in fd_h2_conn.c and called from fd_grpc_client.c
FD-side symbol is fd_rust_cast_double_to_ulong (mimics Agave's Rust cast semantics)
fd_map.c is a template; the symbol is generated as MAP_(remove). The literal token 'MAP_(remove)' appears verbatim at line 384 of the template
